final:
module top_module(
                      input [9:0] d,
                      input clk_inv,
                      input rst,
                      input en,
                      output reg [9:0] q
                      );always @(posedge clk_inv or posedge rst) begin
      if(rst) q <= 0;
      else if(en) q <= d;
   end
endmodule
